name: bettersuno
description: Enhanced Suno.com experience with notifications and song downloads

scripts.publish: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node -e "const p=require('./package.json');const m=require('./manifest.json');m.version=p.version;require('fs').writeFileSync('./manifest.json',JSON.stringify(m,null,2)+'\n')" && node build.js
scripts.sign-firefox: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node -e "const p=require('./package.json');const m=require('./manifest.json');m.version=p.version;require('fs').writeFileSync('./manifest.json',JSON.stringify(m,null,2)+'\n')" && node build.js firefox
